name: In New York, how strict are AEO rules?
description: **Very strict in NY; sanctions for overuse.** Google case example.[1]

mainEntity.name: In New York, how strict are AEO rules?

acceptedAnswer.text: **Very strict in NY; sanctions for overuse.** Google case example.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: **New York courts strictly limit AEO to sparing use, sanctioning overuse.** Recent case hit Google with penalties.[1] Key factors: Not for routine docs. Must justify sensitivity. Statewide commercial division rules apply. Move to de-designate promptly. NY litigators know local nuances.
